synopsis: Imperial terrorists have landed a devastating strike on Wedge Antilles' home planet and captured a member of Rogue Squadron. Now, Wedge and the rest of the Rogues are hot on their trail, determined to find their friend and bring these Imperial thugs to justice. The fighting is fierce and the flying is faster in this whiz-bang conclusion to the series that defines the hottest heroes in the Expanded Universe and launches an ace fighter squadron like none other in the galaxy!
title: X-Wing: Rogue Leader #3
